name: IdsEdwLfstylRateFctrDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte1 AS (SELECT T1.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_SK, T1.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_ID, LTRIM(RTRIM(T1.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD)) AS MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD, T1.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_EFF_DT, T1.SRC_SYS_CD, T1.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T1.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T1.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD_SK, T1.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_TERM_DT, T1.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR, T2.TRGT_CD_NM FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR T1 LEFT JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.CD_MPPNG T2 ON LTRIM(RTRIM(T1.MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD)) = LTRIM(RTRIM(T2.SRC_CD)) AND T2.SRC_SYS_CD = 'FACETS' AND T2.SRC_CLCTN_CD = 'FACETS DBO' AND T2.SRC_DOMAIN_NM = 'MEMBER LIFESTYLE BENEFIT' AND T2.TRGT_CLCTN_CD = 'IDS' AND T2.TRGT_DOMAIN_NM = 'MEMBER LIFESTYLE BENEFIT' WHERE T1.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle}), cte2 AS (SELECT LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_SK, LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_ID, MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD, CAST(LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_EFF_DT AS date) AS LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_EFF_DT, SRC_SYS_CD, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, '@{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate}' AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, CASE WHEN TRGT_CD_NM IS NULL OR TRGT_CD_NM = '' THEN 'UNK' ELSE TRGT_CD_NM END AS MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_NM, CAST(LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_TERM_DT AS date) AS LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR_TERM_DT, LFSTYL_RATE_FCTR, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, MBR_LFSTYL_BNF_CD_SK FROM cte1) SELECT * FROM cte2
